[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image is a four-panel collage showing the same person making similar hand and facial gestures from a close-up, selfie-style angle.

Main Subject:
A person with long, straight, medium-to-dark brown hair is shown in close-up. In each panel, the person has light skin and dark eyes, with makeup that includes red-pink lips and subtle eye makeup. Their right hand is raised near the face, forming an “OK” sign with the thumb and index finger touching, while the other fingers are held forward; the face tilts slightly toward the camera. In at least one panel, the other hand is partly visible near the lower face area. The person’s expression appears neutral to slightly posed, with eyes looking toward the camera.

Setting:
The background appears indoors with a plain light-colored wall. Behind the person is dark fabric with a light trim along the edge, resembling the top portion of a couch, chair, or curtain. A small, pale object with colorful items inside is visible in the upper background area, hanging or sitting near the top center.

Visual Details:
The lighting is soft and even, typical of indoor ambient light. The camera is very close to the face, creating a cropped view that emphasizes the eyes, lips, and the raised hand gesture. Hair falls across the forehead and around the sides of the face. The collage layout repeats the same scene four times in a grid (two columns by two rows), with slight differences in hand and facial position between panels.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a close-up selfie collage of a person with long brown hair making an “OK” hand gesture near their face. The background is an indoor setting with a plain wall and dark fabric visible behind them.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A four-panel collage of a young East Asian woman with long, reddish-brown hair styled with two pink, fluffy cat ear headbands. She is making a pouty face with her lips pursed, and her eyes are looking slightly to the side with a playful expression. Her hands are brought up to her face in a fist-like gesture, with her thumbs tucked in. She is wearing a black t-shirt. The background appears to be a bedroom with clothing hanging on a rack behind her. The lighting is soft and diffused, creating a warm and intimate atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by warm tones of brown, pink, and black, with hints of white in the background. The overall mood is cute, playful, and youthful.
